## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Ribbon;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Ribbon { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
awareness, strip, band, tape, strap, cordon

## Categories
social, medical, emoji

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/ribbon)
